appliedChanges: Removed column "Date": The entire dataset is being removed as it is fundamentally misaligned with the analysis goal of assessing bias in financial decisions. This column is part of a stock market dataset, not an applicant dataset.

This column is part of a stock market dataset, not an applicant dataset, and suffers from severe data quality issues with over 68% missing values.

summary: The original dataset was determined to be completely unsuitable for the intended analysis of bias in financial decisions. It contained stock market data instead of the required applicant data, lacking any relevant features such as demographics, application details, or decision outcomes. Furthermore, it suffered from critical data quality issues with over 68% of rows missing essential data. As a result, all columns have been removed to prevent the use of this inappropriate dataset. A new, relevant dataset is required.
